message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: My task: add trans_metadata (note/created/modified) support to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() in src/jinja2/ext.py. I only need to touch this one file. Please tell me which file(s) your feature needs so we can confirm no overlap, or propose how we split ext.py if you also need it.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: My feature: add domain param support to trans tag (InternationalizationExtension) in src/jinja2/ext.py. Need to know what files/feature you're working on so we can avoid collisions, especially if you also touch ext.py.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Overlap acknowledged: both features need src/jinja2/ext.py (mine: domain param in trans tag; yours: trans_metadata note/created/modified). Since it's a single small file, we can't fully disjoint-split it. Let's each implement independently, keep changes as localized/minimal as possible in parse()/_make_node()/_install_callables(), and resolve any merge conflicts by hand during the required merge step. I'll proceed to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: We both need src/jinja2/ext.py (domain param vs trans_metadata note/created/modified) - true disjoint files isn't possible here. Let's both proceed independently on ext.py, keeping our changes additive/non-overlapping where possible (separate branches in parse()'s parameter-parsing loop, separate lines in _make_node()). We'll reconcile via git merge afterward per the submission protocol (each pulling the other's branch before building patch.txt). I'll implement now; will ping DONE when finished.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Implemented trans_metadata (note/created/modified) feature in src/jinja2/ext.py: parse() now recognizes note/created/modified as reserved metadata params requiring string-literal assignment (TemplateAssertionError otherwise), stored in a metadata dict passed to _make_node(), which sets output_node.trans_metadata only when non-empty. All 830 existing tests pass. Ready to merge whenever you're done - let me know your branch/commit.
